Further classification may be required to provide a more specific and detailed description of Walpersia.

The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which may help alleviate various health issues such as fever, respiratory problems, and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of Walpersia include annonaceous acetogenins, lignans, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
